## Editing.Ingredients.Validators.validateGanacheCharacteristics() function

Validate ganache characteristics percentages. Ensures all values are 0-100 and total doesn't exceed 100.

```typescript
export declare function validateGanacheCharacteristics(entity: Ingredient): Result<true>;
```
